notes: Cycle 022 delivers livelock-probe (Pivot_Score 8.175) — the first pip-installable tool to detect when an AI agent is making zero net progress toward its goal despite being active. The John 5:5-9 structural analog is precise: the man's 38-year stuck state was not laziness, not error, not idleness — it was a race-condition mechanism he could never win. No current AI agent tool (Langfuse, Arize Phoenix, AgentRx, LangSmith, Braintrust) distinguishes this from slowness. The MANDATORY ENFORCEMENT AUDIT for cycles 018-022 returned CLEAN — zero violations, zero yellow flags across five cycles. 33 Level 3 patterns total. 22 tools in pipeline. Anthropic's Claude Code quota exhaustion (The Register, March 2026) confirms livelock is a live production problem. AgentRx (Microsoft Research, March 2026) was the closest competitive threat — confirmed ORTHOGONAL (first-unrecoverable-step ≠ structural livelock). Window: 4-6 months. Next mandatory audit: cycle 025.
